title: Interviews of NEET Youth and Preparatory Vocational Education Project Workers 2013
description: The study examined a preparatory vocational education project from the perspective of NEET youth (not in employment, education or training) aged 17-24 and the project staff. Interviews were used to find out the young people's experiences of the education and guidance as well as the project staff's opinions on the services provided to young people at the transition phase from basic education to upper secondary education.
